# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (20 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_1
#   year=1942 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tanks_1
#   year=1944 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_3
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# super_heavy_tanks_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_tanks_4
#   year=1950 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_I]

# heavy_tanks_5
#   year=1960 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[hardware_III]

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # basic_heavy_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tanks_1 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tanks_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_naval_engine_conversion_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_transmission_improvements_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_specialized_field_manuals_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_high_impact_obliterator_cannon_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tanks_2 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tanks_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tanks_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tanks_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tanks_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tanks_3 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tanks_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tanks_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tanks_2 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tanks_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tanks_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tanks_4 â€” 1950
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tanks_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_I
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tanks_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_tanks_5 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_tanks_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_III
        }
        add_technology = heavy_tanks_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

    # infantry_weapons â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = mechanized_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = mechanized_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
            has_tech = specialist_3
        }
        add_technology = specialist_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ammo_explosives_4 â€” 1985

            NOT = { has_tech = ammo_explosives_4 }

# â”€â”€ LAND / LIGHT_TANKS (14 techs) â”€â”€

# gwtank
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# gwtank_chassis
#   year=1918 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_1
#   year=1942 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_2
#   year=1944 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_3
#   year=1947 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# light_tanks_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_I]

# light_tanks_5
#   year=1975 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_IV]

# light_tanks_6
#   year=1995 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35 deps=[hardware_VII]

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # gwtank â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_light_tank_chassis â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_tank_chassis â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_1 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }

    }
    # light_tanks_2 â€” 1944

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_I
        }
        add_technology = light_tanks_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_5 â€” 1975
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tanks_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1975 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_IV
        }
        add_technology = light_tanks_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_tanks_6 â€” 1995
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tanks_6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1995 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_VII
        }
        add_technology = light_tanks_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) â”€â”€

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1940 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1942 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks
#   year=1942 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# advanced_medium_tank
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1944 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_2
#   year=1947 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# main_battle_tanks_3
#   year=1950 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_I]

# main_battle_tanks_4
#   year=1960 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_III]

# main_battle_tanks_5
#   year=1965 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_IV]

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VI]

# main_battle_tanks_7
#   year=1985 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_VII]

# main_battle_tanks_8
#   year=1995 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_IX]

# main_battle_tanks_9
#   year=2005 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 deps=[hardware_X]

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1938
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1938 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_1 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tanks_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_2 â€” 1947
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1947 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1950 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_I
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tanks_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tanks_4 â€” 1960
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1960 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }

            has_tech = hardware_III
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tanks_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tanks_5 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1965 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_tech = hardware_IV
        }

# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_support_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # basic_train â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = basic_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_support â€” 1935
    if = {

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = motorised_infantry_5
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital7 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = motorised_infantry_5
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_field_hospital_helicopter7 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_field_hospital_helicopter7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = tech_field_hospital_helicopter6
            has_tech = tech_field_hospital7
            has_tech = utility_helicopter_5
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital_helicopter7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_armor_engineers7 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_armor_engineers7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = tech_armor_engineers6
            has_tech = tech_engineers7
            has_tech = main_battle_tanks_7
        }
        add_technology = tech_armor_engineers7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mech_recon7 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mech_recon7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = tech_mech_recon6
            has_tech = tech_recon7
            has_tech = mechanized_infantry7
        }
        add_technology = tech_mech_recon7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company_helicopter7 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company_helicopter7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
            has_tech = tech_logistics_company_helicopter6
            has_tech = tech_logistics_company7
            has_tech = cargo_helicopter_5
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company_helicopter7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # iw_armored_vehicles â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = iw_armored_vehicles }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = iw_armored_vehicles
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_td â€” 1941

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / BATTLESHIPS (15 techs) â”€â”€

# early_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battlecruiser
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_battleship
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ship_hull_super_heavy
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# improved_heavy_armor_scheme
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 [XP_GATED]

# basic_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_battlecruiser
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_battleship
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_heavy
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_battleship
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# heavy_battleship2
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=battleships
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_battleships_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # early_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battlecruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_battleship â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = early_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_hull_super_heavy â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_hull_super_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ship_hull_super_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_heavy_armor_scheme
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_heavy_armor_scheme
    # basic_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_battlecruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_battlecruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = basic_battlecruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_battleship â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = improved_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_heavy â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_heavy }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_heavy
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_battleship â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_battleship }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = advanced_battleship
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_battleship2 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_battleship2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
        }
        add_technology = heavy_battleship2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (34 techs) â”€â”€

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww_carriers
#   year=1935 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1939 branch=naval category=carriers

# carrier_hull_3

#   year=1990 branch=naval category=carriers

#   year=2005 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# carrier_hull_super_4
#   year=2005 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww_carriers â€” 1935
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww_carriers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1935 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1985 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_hull_light_3 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_hull_light_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_light_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_hull_super_3 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_hull_super_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_super_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_4 â€” 1990
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1990 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_tech = hardware_IX
            has_tech = atomic_reactor_naval_0
        }
        add_technology = carrier_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_hull_4 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_hull_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # supercarrier_2 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = supercarrier_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_tech = hardware_XI
        }
        add_technology = supercarrier_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_5 â€” 2000
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2000 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_tech = hardware_XI
            has_tech = atomic_reactor_naval_II
        }
        add_technology = carrier_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_hull_light_4 â€” 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_hull_light_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_light_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # carrier_hull_super_4 â€” 2005
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = carrier_hull_super_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = carrier_hull_super_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / DESTROYERS (17 techs) â”€â”€

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# smoke_generator
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_depth_charges
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# sonar
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_destroyer
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# basic_ship_hull_light
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers

# improved_sonar

#   year=1936 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# improved_ship_hull_light
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_depth_charges
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers

# advanced_sonar
#   year=1939 branch=naval category=destroyers

#   year=1940 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_ship_hull_light
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# modern_depth_charges
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 [XP_GATED]

# modern_sonar
#   year=1943 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# advanced_destroyer
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=destroyers
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # early_ship_hull_light â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # smoke_generator â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = smoke_generator }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = smoke_generator
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_depth_charges
    # sonar â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_destroyer â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = early_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_light â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): improved_depth_charges
    # improved_sonar â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }

#   year=1922 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45 [XP_GATED]

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_heavy_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_heavy_cruiser â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_cruiser

    }
    # early_light_cruiser â€” 1922

            NOT = { has_tech = early_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_light_cruiser â€” 1944
    if = {

            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # basic_torpedo â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_torpedo }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_torpedo
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_naval_mines â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = ship_armament_super_heavy_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = ship_armament_super_heavy_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ship_armament_heavy_2 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ship_armament_heavy_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# heavy_sam_4
#   year=1995 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# ashm_4
#   year=1995 branch=naval category=submarines

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[hardware_XI]

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# sub_hull_large_double_3

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# torpedo_small_4
#   year=2005 branch=naval category=submarines
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25 deps=[hardware_X]

arm_grant_naval_submarines_cold_war_iron_curtain = {
    # early_ship_hull_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_submarine â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_submarine }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
        }
        add_technology = early_submarine
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sub_hull_small_single_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sub_hull_large_double_2 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sub_hull_large_double_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sub_hull_large_double_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # vls_0 â€” 1980
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = vls_0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1980 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines

        add_technology = vls_0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            has_tech = hardware_V
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            has_tech = hardware_VII

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 2005 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_tech = hardware_X
        }
        add_technology = torpedo_small_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
